extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard won from the breakaway by 48-49 seconds over ROGLIC Primoz, who gained 1:49 on red jersey EVENEPOEL Remco showing first vulnerability
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL cracked on final 15%+ ramps after dominating for two weeks, suggesting steep gradient thresholds exceed his capabilities
ROGLIC gained 1:49 without attacking, letting Harper pace while others imploded on successive 15% pitches separated by brief descent
Breakaway survived despite 1:24 gap with 2.5 miles remaining because GC teams refused to commit before final slopes

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: first major weakness shown on 15%+ gradients after two-week dominance, lost nearly two minutes suggesting steep pitch vulnerability
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: closed GC gap to 1:49 without attacking by letting Harper pace, positioning for high-altitude stage tomorrow
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: second stage win, held off charging GC group in final kilometers despite shrinking advantage
rider_signals.MAS Enrique: negative: completely came apart trying to match Roglic on final kilometers, lost 2:43 to Evenepoel
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: took second and time bonus, showing form ahead of high-altitude stages
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: positive: young Spaniard climbing well in podium battle, finishing with lead GC group
